name: omics-analysis
description: Codex-compatible omics analysis plugin collection with self-contained skills for single-cell RNA-seq QC/preprocessing/integration/annotation/marker analysis, scRNA workflow planning, pathway enrichment, bulk RNA DE, scvi-tools, and Nextflow/nf-core workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plugin-local omics analysis skills for Codex agents.
interface.longDescription: Run plugin-local omics skills for environment checks, dry-run planning, approved execution, manifests, and reports without requiring a backend command-line tool.
defaultPrompt: Inspect an input directory and choose the right omics skill.
Prepare a Nextflow nf-core run for FASTQ data.
Plan a standard scRNA workflow, or run scRNA-seq QC, preprocessing, integration, annotation, marker analysis, pathway enrichment, and bulk RNA DE.
Train an approved scvi-tools integration model.
